title: LOUISIANA COSMETOLOGY ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6.  LOUISIANA COSMETOLOGY ACT

PART I.  LICENSING AND REGULATION IN GENERAL

§491.  Repealed by Acts 2001, No. 907, §3, eff. June 26, 2001.
